records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing ʿumrah During the Months of Hajj
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2942 - Abdullah ibn Sinan asked Imam (as) about a servant who is out grazing animals and agrees to perform Umrah and then leave.
Imam (as) said: "If he performed Umrah in Dhu al-Qa'dah, it is good. But if it is in Dhu al-Hijjah, then it is not suitable except for Hajj."
records.arabicText: 2942 - وَ سَأَلَهُ عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ : عَنِ اَلْمَمْلُوكِ يَكُونُ فِي اَلظَّهْرِ يَرْعَى وَ هُوَ يَرْضَى أَنْ يَعْتَمِرَ ثُمَّ يَخْرُجَ فَقَالَ «إِنْ كَانَ اِعْتَمَرَ فِي ذِي اَلْقَعْدَةِ فَحَسَنٌ وَ إِنْ كَانَ فِي ذِي اَلْحِجَّةِ فَلاَ يَصْلُحُ إِلاَّ اَلْحَجُّ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.2942 - Abdullah ibn Sinan asked Imam (as) about a servant who is out grazing animals and agrees to perform Umrah and then leave.
Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "If he performed Umrah in Dhu al-Qa'dah, it is good. But if it is in Dhu al-Hijjah, then it is not suitable except for Hajj."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing ʿumrah During the Months of Hajj
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2943 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) performed three separate Umrahs, all of them in Dhu al-Qa'dah:
The Umrah of Hudaybiyyah: He entered the state of Ihram for it from Usfan.
The Umrah of Qadha': He entered the state of Ihram for it from Al-Juhfah.
The Umrah of Ji'ranah: This was after he returned from Ta’if following the Battle of Hunayn, and he entered the state of Ihram for it from Al-Ji'ranah.
records.arabicText: 2943 - وَ اِعْتَمَرَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ ثَلاَثَ عُمَرٍ مُتَفَرِّقَاتٍ كُلُّهَا فِي ذِي اَلْقَعْدَةِ عُمْرَةً أَهَلَّ فِيهَا مِنْ عُسْفَانَ وَ هِيَ عُمْرَةُ اَلْحُدَيْبِيَةِ وَ عُمْرَةَ اَلْقَضَاءِ أَحْرَمَ فِيهَا مِنَ اَلْجُحْفَةِ وَ عُمْرَةً أَهَلَّ فِيهَا مِنَ اَلْجِعْرَانَةِ وَ هِيَ بَعْدَ أَنْ رَجَعَ مِنَ اَلطَّائِفِ مِنْ غَزْوَةِ حُنَيْنٍ.

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2944 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"If an Mu'tamir (one performing Umrah) enters Mecca without intending Tamattu‘, performs Tawaf of the House, prays two rak'ahs at the Maqam of Ibrahim (as), and performs Sa'i between Safa and Marwah, he may return to his family if he wishes."
records.arabicText: 2944 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «إِذَا دَخَلَ اَلْمُعْتَمِرُ مَكَّةَ مِنْ غَيْرِ تَمَتُّعٍ وَ طَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ وَ صَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ عِنْدَ مَقَامِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ سَعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ فَلْيَلْحَقْ بِأَهْلِهِ إِنْ شَاءَ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2944 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "If an Mu'tamir (one performing Umrah) enters Mecca without intending Tamattu‘, performs Tawaf of the House, prays two rak'ahs at the Maqam of Ibrahim (as), and performs Sa'i between Safa and Marwah, he may return to his family if he wishes."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2945 - It was narrated from Imam (as) that he said:
"Whoever brings a sacrificial animal during Umrah should slaughter it before shaving his head."
Imam (as) further said: "And whoever brings a sacrificial animal while performing Umrah should slaughter it at the designated slaughtering place (Manhar), which is between Safa and Marwah, at al-Hazwarah."
records.arabicText: 2945 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : «مَنْ سَاقَ هَدْياً فِي عُمْرَةٍ فَلْيَنْحَرْ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَحْلِقَ رَأْسَهُ » قَالَ «وَ مَنْ سَاقَ هَدْياً وَ هُوَ مُعْتَمِرٌ نَحَرَ هَدْيَهُ عِنْدَ اَلْمَنْحَرِ وَ هُوَ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ وَ هِيَ اَلْحَزْوَرَةُ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2945 - It was narrated from Imam (as) that he said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"Whoever brings a sacrificial animal during Umrah should slaughter it before shaving his head."
Imam (as) further said: "And whoever brings a sacrificial animal while performing Umrah should slaughter it at the designated slaughtering place (Manhar), which is between Safa and Marwah, at al-Hazwarah."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2946 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Misma' ibn Abdul-Malik, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who performs an independent Umrah (Umrah Mufradah), then performs the Tawaf of obligation around the Ka'bah, but has marital relations with his wife before performing Sa'i between Safa and Marwah.
Imam (as) said: "He has invalidated his Umrah, and he must offer a camel (badnah) as a penalty. He should remain in Mecca until the month in which he performed the Umrah has passed. Then he must go to the Miqat specified by the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) for the people of his region, enter into Ihram from there, and perform a new Umrah."
records.arabicText: 2946 - وَ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ رِئَابٍ عَنْ مِسْمَعِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اَلْمَلِكِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اَلرَّجُلِ يَعْتَمِرُ عُمْرَةً مُفْرَدَةً ثُمَّ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ طَوَافَ اَلْفَرِيضَةِ ثُمَّ يَغْشَى اِمْرَأَتَهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ قَالَ «قَدْ أَفْسَدَ عُمْرَتَهُ وَ عَلَيْهِ بَدَنَةٌ وَ يُقِيمُ بِمَكَّةَ حَتَّى يَخْرُجَ اَلشَّهْرُ اَلَّذِي اِعْتَمَرَ فِيهِ ثُمَّ يَخْرُجُ إِلَى اَلْوَقْتِ اَلَّذِي وَقَّتَهُ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ لِأَهْلِهِ فَيُحْرِمُ مِنْهُ وَ يَعْتَمِرُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2946 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Misma' ibn Abdul-Malik, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who performs an independent Umrah (Umrah Mufradah), then performs the Tawaf of obligation around the Ka'bah, but has marital relations with his wife before performing Sa'i between Safa and Marwah.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "He has invalidated his Umrah, and he must offer a camel (badnah) as a penalty. He should remain in Mecca until the month in which he performed the Umrah has passed. Then he must go to the Miqat specified by the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) for the people of his region, enter into Ihram from there, and perform a new Umrah."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2947 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Burayd al-‘Ijli, from Abu Ja'far (as):
"He (a person who invalidates their Umrah) must go out to one of the Miqats, enter Ihram from there, and perform a new Umrah."
records.arabicText: 2947 - وَ قَدْ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ رِئَابٍ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ اَلْعِجْلِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ يَخْرُجُ إِلَى بَعْضِ اَلْمَوَاقِيتِ فَيُحْرِمُ مِنْهُ وَ يَعْتَمِرُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2947 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Burayd al-‘Ijli, from Abu Ja'far (as):
records.thaqalaynMatn: "He (a person who invalidates their Umrah) must go out to one of the Miqats, enter Ihram from there, and perform a new Umrah."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2948 - Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Salim ibn al-Fudhayl, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as): "We have entered Mecca for Umrah. Should we trim (taqsir) or shave (halq)?"
Imam (as) said: "Shave, for the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) invoked mercy for those who shave their heads three times and for those who trim their hair only once."
records.arabicText: 2948 - وَ رَوَى صَفْوَانُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ سَالِمِ بْنِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ دَخَلْنَا بِعُمْرَةٍ فَنُقَصِّرُ أَوْ نَحْلِقُ فَقَالَ «اِحْلِقْ فَإِنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ تَرَحَّمَ عَلَى اَلْمُحَلِّقِينَ ثَلاَثَ مَرَّاتٍ وَ عَلَى اَلْمُقَصِّرِينَ مَرَّةً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2948 - Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Salim ibn al-Fudhayl, who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as): "We have entered Mecca for Umrah. Should we trim (taqsir) or shave (halq)?"
Imam (as) said: "Shave, for the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) invoked mercy for those who shave their heads three times and for those who trim their hair only once."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing Umrah in the Month of Ramadan, Rajab, and Other Months
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2949 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he was asked:
"Which Umrah is better, an Umrah in the month of Rajab or an Umrah in the Month of Ramadan?"
Imam (as) said: "No, an Umrah in the month of Rajab is better."
records.arabicText: 2949 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ أَيُّ اَلْعُمْرَةِ أَفْضَلُ عُمْرَةٌ فِي رَجَبٍ أَوْ عُمْرَةٌ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَلْ عُمْرَةٌ فِي شَهْرِ رَجَبٍ أَفْضَلُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2949 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he was asked:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"Which Umrah is better, an Umrah in the month of Rajab or an Umrah in the Month of Ramadan?"
Imam (as) said: "No, an Umrah in the month of Rajab is better."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing Umrah in the Month of Ramadan, Rajab, and Other Months
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2950 - It was narrated from Abdul-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who enters Ihram in one month and exits Ihram in another month.
Imam (as) said: "He will be rewarded according to his intention."
And Imam (as) also said: "He will be rewarded for the better of the two months."
records.arabicText: 2950 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ اَلْحَجَّاجِ : فِي رَجُلٍ أَحْرَمَ فِي شَهْرٍ وَ أَحَلَّ فِي آخَرَ قَالَ «يُكْتَبُ لَهُ فِي اَلَّذِي نَوَى » وَ قَالَ «يُكْتَبُ لَهُ فِي أَفْضَلِهَا ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2950 - It was narrated from Abdul-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who enters Ihram in one month and exits Ihram in another month.
records.thaqalaynMatn:
Imam (as) said: "He will be rewarded according to his intention."
And Imam (as) also said: "He will be rewarded for the better of the two months."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing Umrah in the Month of Ramadan, Rajab, and Other Months
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2951 - In a narration from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"If you enter Ihram with one day and night remaining in the month of Rajab, your Umrah will be considered a Rajabi Umrah."
records.arabicText: 2951 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «إِذَا أَحْرَمْتَ وَ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ رَجَبٍ يَوْمٌ وَ لَيْلَةٌ فَعُمْرَتُكَ رَجَبِيَّةٌ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2951 - In a narration from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "If you enter Ihram with one day and night remaining in the month of Rajab, your Umrah will be considered a Rajabi Umrah."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2952 - Umar ibn Yazid narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Whoever wishes to leave Mecca to perform Umrah should enter Ihram from Al-Ji'ranah, Al-Hudaybiyah, or similar locations. And whoever leaves Mecca intending Umrah and then enters in the state of Ihram should not stop reciting the Talbiyah until they see the Ka'bah."
records.arabicText: 2952 - رَوَى عُمَرُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَخْرُجَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ لِيَعْتَمِرَ أَحْرَمَ مِنَ اَلْجِعْرَانَةِ وَ اَلْحُدَيْبِيَةِ وَ مَا أَشْبَهَهُمَا وَ مَنْ خَرَجَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ يُرِيدُ اَلْعُمْرَةَ ثُمَّ دَخَلَ مُعْتَمِراً لَمْ يَقْطَعِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ حَتَّى يَنْظُرَ إِلَى اَلْكَعْبَةِ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2952 - Umar ibn Yazid narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever wishes to leave Mecca to perform Umrah should enter Ihram from Al-Ji'ranah, Al-Hudaybiyah, or similar locations. And whoever leaves Mecca intending Umrah and then enters in the state of Ihram should not stop reciting the Talbiyah until they see the Ka'bah."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2953 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one sees the Sacred Mosque (Masjid al-Haram)."
records.arabicText: 2953 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَى اَلْمَسْجِدِ اَلْحَرَامِ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2953 - It was narrated:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one sees the Sacred Mosque (Masjid al-Haram)."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2954 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one enters the boundary of the Sacred Precinct (Haram)."
records.arabicText: 2954 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا دَخَلَ أَوَّلَ اَلْحَرَمِ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2954 - It was narrated:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one enters the boundary of the Sacred Precinct (Haram)."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2955 - In a narration from Al-Fudhayl, he said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as): "I entered Mecca for Umrah; where should I stop the Talbiyah?"
Imam (as) said: "At the height of the Aqabah of the Madinites."
I asked: "Where is the Aqabah of the Madinites?"
Imam (as) replied: "At the location of the Qassarun (the dyers' area)."
records.arabicText: 2955 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قُلْتُ دَخَلْتُ بِعُمْرَةٍ فَأَيْنَ أَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ فَقَالَ «بِحِيَالِ اَلْعَقَبَةِ عَقَبَةِ اَلْمَدَنِيِّينَ » قُلْتُ أَيْنَ عَقَبَةُ اَلْمَدَنِيِّينَ قَالَ «بِحِيَالِ اَلْقَصَّارِينَ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.2955 - In a narration from Al-Fudhayl, he said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as): "I entered Mecca for Umrah; where should I stop the Talbiyah?"
Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"At the height of the Aqabah of the Madinites."
I asked: "Where is the Aqabah of the Madinites?"
Imam (as) replied: "At the location of the Qassarun (the dyers' area)."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2956 - It was narrated from Yunus ibn Ya'qub, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man performing an independent Umrah Mufradah.
Imam (as) said: "When you see Dhu Tuwa, stop the Talbiyah."
records.arabicText: 2956 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَعْتَمِرُ عُمْرَةً مُفْرَدَةً فَقَالَ «إِذَا رَأَيْتَ ذَا طُوًى فَاقْطَعِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ».
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.2956 - It was narrated from Yunus ibn Ya'qub, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man performing an independent Umrah Mufradah.
Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "When you see Dhu Tuwa, stop the Talbiyah."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2957 - In a narration from Murazim, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"The one performing Umrah Mufradah should stop the Talbiyah when the camels place their hooves within the Haram."
records.arabicText: 2957 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ مُرَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «يَقْطَعُ صَاحِبُ اَلْعُمْرَةِ اَلْمُفْرَدَةِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا وَضَعَتِ اَلْإِبِلُ أَخْفَافَهَا فِي اَلْحَرَمِ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2957 - In a narration from Murazim, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The one performing Umrah Mufradah should stop the Talbiyah when the camels place their hooves within the Haram."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2958 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one sees the houses of Mecca."
records.arabicText: 2958 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَى بُيُوتِ مَكَّةَ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2958 - It was narrated:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one sees the houses of Mecca."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Months of Hajj, the Months of Pilgrimage, and the Sacred Months
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2959 - Zurara narrated from Abu Ja'far (as) regarding the words of Allah (swt), the Exalted: "Hajj is [during] well-known months" (Surah Al-Baqarah 2:197).
Imam (as) said: "Shawwal, Dhu al-Qa'dah, and Dhu al-Hijjah. No one is permitted to enter Ihram for Hajj outside of these months."
records.arabicText:
2959 - رَوَى زُرَارَةُ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي قَوْلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ «۝ اَلْحَجُّ أَشْهُرٌ مَعْلُومٰاتٌ ۝»
قَالَ « شَوَّالٌ وَ ذُو اَلْقَعْدَةِ وَ ذُو اَلْحِجَّةِ لَيْسَ لِأَحَدٍ أَنْ يُحْرِمَ بِالْحَجِّ فِيمَا سِوَاهُنَّ».
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.2959 - Zurara narrated from Abu Ja'far (as) regarding the words of Allah (swt), the Exalted: "Hajj is [during] well-known months" (Surah Al-Baqarah 2:197).
Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Shawwal, Dhu al-Qa'dah, and Dhu al-Hijjah. No one is permitted to enter Ihram for Hajj outside of these months."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Months of Hajj, the Months of Pilgrimage, and the Sacred Months
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2960 - In another narration:
"And a month designated specifically for Umrah is Rajab."
records.arabicText: 2960 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةٍ أُخْرَى : «وَ شَهْرٌ مُفْرَدٌ لِعُمْرَةٍ رَجَبٌ ».

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Months of Hajj, the Months of Pilgrimage, and the Sacred Months
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2961 - Imam (as) said:
"Allah (swt), the Exalted, has not created on the earth a spot more beloved to Him than the Ka'bah, nor more honored by Him. For its sake, Allah (swt), the Exalted, sanctified the four sacred months in His Book 'on the day He created the heavens and the earth' (Surah At-Tawbah 9:36).
Three of these months are consecutive for Hajj, and one is designated specifically for Umrah, which is Rajab."
records.arabicText: 2961 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَا خَلَقَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي اَلْأَرْضِ بُقْعَةً أَحَبَّ إِلَيْهِ مِنَ اَلْكَعْبَةِ وَ لاَ أَكْرَمَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْهَا وَ لَهَا حَرَّمَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ، اَلْأَشْهُرَ اَلْحُرُمَ اَلْأَرْبَعَةَ فِي كِتَابِهِ «۝ يَوْمَ خَلَقَ اَلسَّمٰاوٰاتِ وَ اَلْأَرْضَ ۝» ثَلاَثَةٌ مِنْهَا مُتَوَالِيَةٌ لِلْحَجِّ وَ شَهْرٌ مُفْرَدٌ لِلْعُمْرَةِ رَجَبٌ ».

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Months of Hajj, the Months of Pilgrimage, and the Sacred Months
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2962 - Imam (as) said regarding the words of Allah (swt), the Exalted: "So travel freely throughout the land for four months" (Quran 9:2):
"These are twenty days of Dhu al-Hijjah, the month of Muharram, Safar, the month of Rabi' al-Awwal, and ten days of Rabi' al-Thani. The ten days of the beginning of Dhu al-Hijjah are not counted among the four months."
records.arabicText:
2962 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي قَوْلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ: «۝ فَسِيحُوا فِي اَلْأَرْضِ أَرْبَعَةَ أَشْهُرٍ ۝»
قَالَ «عِشْرِينَ مِنْ ذِي اَلْحِجَّةِ وَ اَلْمُحَرَّمَ وَ صَفَرَ وَ شَهْرَ رَبِيعٍ اَلْأَوَّلِ وَ عَشَرَةَ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَبِيعٍ اَلْآخِرِ وَ لاَ يُحْسَبُ فِي اَلْأَرْبَعَةِ اَلْأَشْهُرِ، عَشَرَةُ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ أَوَّلِ ذِي اَلْحِجَّةِ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2962 - Imam (as) said regarding the words of Allah (swt), the Exalted: "So travel freely throughout the land for four months" (Quran 9:2):
records.thaqalaynMatn: "These are twenty days of Dhu al-Hijjah, the month of Muharram, Safar, the month of Rabi' al-Awwal, and ten days of Rabi' al-Thani. The ten days of the beginning of Dhu al-Hijjah are not counted among the four months."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on the Months of Hajj, the Months of Pilgrimage, and the Sacred Months
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2963 - Abu Ja'far al-Ahwal narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who enters Ihram for Hajj outside of the months of Hajj.
Imam (as) said: "He should make it an Umrah."
records.arabicText: 2963 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ اَلْأَحْوَلُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ فَرَضَ اَلْحَجَّ فِي غَيْرِ أَشْهُرِ اَلْحَجِّ قَالَ «يَجْعَلُهَا عُمْرَةً ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2963 - Abu Ja'far al-Ahwal narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who enters Ihram for Hajj outside of the months of Hajj.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "He should make it an Umrah."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing Umrah Every Month and Its Minimum Interval
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2964 - Ishaq ibn Ammar narrated that Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"The year has twelve months, and an Umrah can be performed in each month."
records.arabicText: 2964 - رَوَى إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «اَلسَّنَةُ اِثْنَا عَشَرَ شَهْراً يُعْتَمَرُ لِكُلِّ شَهْرٍ عُمْرَةٌ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2964 - Ishaq ibn Ammar narrated that Abu Abdullah (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The year has twelve months, and an Umrah can be performed in each month."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing Umrah Every Month and Its Minimum Interval
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2965 - Ali ibn Abi Hamzah narrated from Abu al-Hasan Musa (as), who said:
"There is an Umrah for every month."
I asked him: "Can it be less than that?"
Imam (as) said: "There is an Umrah for every ten days."
records.arabicText: 2965 - وَ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «لِكُلِّ شَهْرٍ عُمْرَةٌ» قَالَ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ أَ يَكُونُ أَقَلَّ مِنْ ذَلِكَ قَالَ «لِكُلِّ عَشَرَةِ أَيَّامٍ عُمْرَةٌ».
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.2965 - Ali ibn Abi Hamzah narrated from Abu al-Hasan Musa (as), who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"There is an Umrah for every month."
I asked him: "Can it be less than that?"
Imam (as) said: "There is an Umrah for every ten days."

records.category: Book of Pilgrimage and Its Virtues
records.chapter: Chapter on Performing Umrah Every Month and Its Minimum Interval
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.2966 - Aban narrated from Abu al-Jarud, from one of the Imams (as), who said:
I asked him about performing Umrah after Hajj in Dhu al-Hijjah.
Imam (as) said: "It is good."
records.arabicText: 2966 - وَ رَوَى أَبَانٌ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْجَارُودِ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلْعُمْرَةِ بَعْدَ اَلْحَجِّ فِي ذِي اَلْحِجَّةِ قَالَ «حَسَنٌ ».
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.2966 - Aban narrated from Abu al-Jarud, from one of the Imams (as), who said:
I asked him about performing Umrah after Hajj in Dhu al-Hijjah.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "It is good."
